imageAlt: Legacy documentation migration roadmap item preview image
title: Legacy documentation migration
summaryBody: This document discusses the migration of legacy documentation into a reference site. The actions include investigating moving CSS and JS into a monorepo, deciding on labeling or notices for "dodgy" docs, ensuring all migrated docs have title, description, and API table, reviewing content with the team, discussing a layouts section, and later working on page templates. There is no firm release plan or deadlines for this internal project.
